label: original (with ...)
prompt: He started snoring — zzz, zzz — right in the middle of the lecture. "Psst," she hissed, nudging him. "Wake up!" He jolted awake. "Huh? What... what happened?" She sighed. "Shhh — just pay attention." Outside, the wind went whoosh through the open window, and somewhere far off... drip, drip, drip.
asr_transcription: He started snoring, zzzzz, right in the middle of the lecture. Psst, she hissed, nudging him. Wake up, he jolted awake. Huh? What? What happened? She sighed.
